scenes.text:
Without an emergency fund, you are always
one bad month away from disaster.

Before you invest, before you start a business, before you do anything, build a three to six month emergency fund. This is your financial foundation. It
is what keeps you from spiraling into debt when the car breaks down, when you lose your job, or when life happens. And life always happens.

Start small. Save one month of expenses first. Then two. Then three. Keep it in a high-yield savings
account where it is accessible but separate from your spending money. This is your peace of mind fund.

An emergency fund is not a luxury.
It is the foundation of financial sanity.

How many months of expenses do you have saved?
No shame, just awareness. Follow for money basics.
